findings.description: CSS-only tooltip (group-hover) not keyboard-accessible; acceptable for v1 but should add focus-within in future iteration

strengths: Consistent CVA + cn pattern across all components
oklch color space with semantic naming
Complete Chinese localization in StateCard defaults
Proper TypeScript types with VariantProps inference
summary.verdict_reason: All components compile cleanly, follow consistent patterns, meet spec requirements, and enforce security constraints. Single low-severity accessibility note is non-blocking.
